ksa_text: Knowledge of enterprise risk management integration, including how data risk, AI risk, model risk, and technology risk roll up into enterprise risk taxonomy and board-level reporting.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.

top_anchors.element_label: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system including third-party software and data.
Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-012 (RM, Knowledge) excluded on seniority grounds. Text contains executive-level content not aligned with IC-to-senior-IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5094. Framework signals: nist_ai_rmf=0.509, eu_ai_act=0.461, nice=0.403. ANL roles in scope are individual contributors through senior ICs; organizational or C-suite-level responsibilities fall outside this band.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Seniority concerns confirmed. Score 0.5094 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-K-012 (composite 0.5094) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5094 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5094 is not a standard requirement for Clinical Data Manager at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5094, domain RM, scope weak fit. High confidence.
